file_insights.description: Project scaffold with 25 .gitkeep files establishing directory hierarchy

structure.src/core: Framework core (base, exceptions, kernel, middleware, services)
structure.src/modules: Feature modules with examples and stubs
structure.src/shared: Shared cross-cutting concerns (abilities, decorators, guards, types, utils)

file_insights.description: Multi-layered architecture following domain-driven and modular design patterns

patterns_discovered.description: Clear separation of concerns with modules directory supporting feature-based organization
patterns_discovered.evidence: src/modules/_core, src/modules/_examples, src/modules/_stubs indicate pluggable module system

patterns_discovered.description: Classic layered architecture with core framework layer, feature modules, and shared utilities
patterns_discovered.evidence: src/core handling framework concerns separately from business logic in modules

patterns_discovered.description: Project prepared for multi-language support from initial setup
patterns_discovered.evidence: locales directory with language-specific subdirectories (en, tr)

patterns_discovered.description: Prisma ORM integrated with dedicated schema and migrations directories
Cross-cutting concerns isolated in shared directory for reuse
patterns_discovered.evidence: src/shared containing abilities, decorators, guards, types, utils

patterns_discovered.description: Public assets organized by type (CSS, images, JavaScript)

gotchas_discovered.description: All directories contain only .gitkeep files with no actual implementation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Directory structure is established but framework is completely empty
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Next phase should populate core files with base classes, interfaces, and entry points

gotchas_discovered.impact: Requires developer discipline to follow naming convention for feature modules
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Document module naming conventions and consider generator scripts for consistency

gotchas_discovered.description: Views directory suggests server-side rendering or templating engine
gotchas_discovered.impact: Architectural decision locked in at project setup stage
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Ensure views framework choice (e.g., EJS, Handlebars, Pug) is communicated to team

approach_outcome.description: Successfully created comprehensive project directory structure
approach_outcome.changes: Created .gitkeep files in 25 directories establishing complete project scaffold
approach_outcome.git_commit: 0b03ddd auto-claude: subtask-1-5 - Create project directory structure
approach_outcome.execution_notes: Clean, single-pass implementation with all directories established in one commit

recommendations.recommendation: Populate src/core framework foundation next (kernel, base classes, exception handling)
recommendations.rationale: Core framework must be established before modules and services can be built

recommendations.recommendation: Create architecture documentation mapping each directory to its purpose and conventions
recommendations.rationale: Complex directory structure requires clear documentation for team onboarding

recommendations.recommendation: Implement generator scripts for common file patterns (modules, services, controllers)
recommendations.rationale: Modular structure will benefit from scaffolding tools to maintain consistency

recommendations.recommendation: Create example configuration files in src/config directory (database, app, services)
recommendations.rationale: Configuration layer is empty and needs sensible defaults and examples

recommendations.recommendation: Consider alternative to .gitkeep (e.g., README files documenting directory purpose)
recommendations.rationale: README files would provide self-documenting directory structure for new developers

recommendations.recommendation: Monitor module directory growth and plan subdirectory organization strategy
recommendations.rationale: Flat module structure may become unwieldy as feature count grows beyond 10-15 modules
